title: anisotome pilifera
intro: Anisotome pilifera, also known as the New Zealand aniseed plant, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and roots are said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating colds and flu, and soothing digestive issues. Anisotome pilifera can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties.
